overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious rooftop garden in a futuristic city, featuring water features, palm trees, and manicured landscaping. The scene transitions from a narrow walkway between reflecting pools to an open garden with views of a towering skyscraper and distant city skyline. The high-fidelity rendering and distinctive architecture indicate this is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along a narrow stone pathway flanked by water on both sides

entered.detail: calm water surface with lily pads floating on the left side of the walkway
clear water reflecting the sky and surrounding trees on the right side
narrow light-colored stone path running between the two water features
tall palm trees visible in the background beyond the water features
tall dark green hedge forming a boundary wall in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow stone walkway suspended between two reflecting pools in a manicured garden. The camera moves steadily forward along the path, with calm water and lily pads visible on both sides. Tall palm trees and hedge walls frame the background while dappled sunlight filters through the foliage overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: manicured garden with grass lawns and specimen trees

events.description: steps off the narrow stone walkway onto the grassy garden area

agents.ego_description: walking across the lawn and gravel paths, exploring the landscaped garden area

entered.detail: well-maintained green grass replacing the stone walkway
light-colored gravel pathways winding through the grass
mature tree with spreading branches providing shade
rectangular dark planter boxes with greenery

segments.scene_description: Leaving the water feature behind, the scene opens into a spacious garden with manicured grass lawns and gravel paths. The camera moves through the landscaped area, passing large specimen trees and rectangular planter boxes. The space feels open and airy with full sky visibility and bright sunlight casting tree shadows across the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal garden terrace approaching a landmark tower

events.description: transitions from grass onto paved terrace area with the futuristic tower becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking along paved pathways toward the tall futuristic tower structure

entered.detail: wide polished stone terrace pathways reflecting the sky
distinctive tall spire-like structure with multiple tiers, likely a landmark skyscraper
transparent safety barrier visible on the right side of the terrace
futuristic high-rise buildings visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The garden transitions to formal paved terraces as a massive futuristic tower dominates the view ahead. The camera moves along polished stone pathways lined with planter boxes, approaching the distinctive spire structure. Distant city buildings begin to appear on the horizon, indicating this garden sits atop a high vantage point in an urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop garden with panoramic city views

events.description: city skyline and holographic advertisements become clearly visible on the left

agents.ego_description: walking while observing the expansive cityscape and skyline views

entered.detail: manicured grass with alternating light and dark stripes in geometric patterns
dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
large floating digital advertisement display with pink and blue graphics
abstract sculptural element in the garden landscape

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a panoramic view of a futuristic city skyline, with holographic billboards floating above the buildings. The camera moves across striped grass lawns while taking in the expansive urban vista. The garden features geometric landscaping patterns with palm trees framing the view of the dense metropolitan area in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a secluded rooftop sanctuary that gradually expands into a panoramic vista of a futuristic metropolis. It begins on a narrow stone walkway suspended between reflecting pools with lily pads, moving forward under dappled sunlight filtered through palm trees and hedge walls. As the water feature recedes, the scene opens into a spacious garden of manicured lawns and gravel paths where bright sunlight casts sharp shadows across the open landscape. The camera then transitions onto formal paved terraces, moving along polished stone pathways toward a massive, dominating futuristic tower that reveals the high vantage point of the garden. Finally, the view expands across geometric grass patterns to reveal a dense city skyline filled with floating holographic billboards and distant skyscrapers.
